1.gl: properly, to glitter from afar, i.e. to be eminent (as a superintendent, especially of the Temple services and its music); to be permanent
1.kj: excel, chief musician (singer), oversee(-r), set forward.
1.dv: a primitive root;  also as denominative from H5331 (נֶצַח)

1.gl: David, the youngest son of Jesse
1.dv: rarely (fully); דָּוִיד; from the same as H1730 (דּוֹד); loving;
or יְדֻתוּן; or יְדִיתוּן; probably from H3034 (יָדָה); laudatory;

1.gl: properly, instrumental music; by implication, a poem set to notes

2.gl: properly, a breathing creature, i.e. animal of (abstractly) vitality; used very widely in a literal, accommodated or figurative sense (bodily or mental)

2.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
2.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

2.gl: a particle of affirmation, surely; hence (by limitation) only
2.kj: also, in any wise, at least, but, certainly, even, howbeit, nevertheless, notwithstanding, only, save, surely, of a surety, truly, verily, [phrase] wherefore, yet (but).

2.gl: something saved, i.e. (abstractly) deliverance; hence, aid, victory, prosperity
2.kj: deliverance, health, help(-ing), salvation, save, saving (health), welfare.

2.gl: stillness; adverbially, silently; abstractly quiet, trust

3.gl: something saved, i.e. (abstractly) deliverance; hence, aid, victory, prosperity

9.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)

9.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.
